name: an AWS-only vision does not pull Azure or GCP namespaces into scope (precise classification)
command: OUT=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "REST API on AWS with CloudFormation, EKS and Terraform, DynamoDB" --classify 2>/dev/null); echo "$OUT" | ruby -rjson -e 'ns=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]["namespaces"]; exit(!ns.include?("azure") && !ns.include?("gcp") ? 0:1)' && echo aws-only-precise 1>&2
